contents.inputConfig: [{"fromContract":false,"keyInclude":false,"mustInput":false,"paasDown":false,"sendSpace":"sql","serviceParam":"sql","type":"constant","value":"SELECT INDICNAME, QUAR, MVALUE, STATDIMCODE, REGIONNAME, PROJCODE FROM TQ_CIBD_REGIFIN_QUAR WHERE REGIONCODE=#{REGIONCODE} AND INDICNAME IN ('一般公共预算收入','一般公共预算支出','地方政府债务余额','地方政府债务余额_专项债务','地区生产总值','税收收入','非税收入','国有土地使用权出让收入','政府性基金收入','政府性基金支出','国有资本经营预算收入','国有资本经营预算支出','融资平台有息债务','地方政府债务限额','转移性收入','上级补助收入') AND STATDIMCODE IN ('1','2') AND ISVALID=1 AND (QUAR=#{QUAR} OR QUAR=(SELECT MAX(q.QUAR) FROM TQ_CIBD_REGIFIN_QUAR q WHERE q.QUAR<#{QUAR} AND q.REGIONCODE=#{REGIONCODE} AND q.ISVALID=1)) ORDER BY QUAR DESC, INDICNAME, STATDIMCODE, PROJCODE ASC"},{"dataType":1,"field":"C_S_SEARCHQUARDATE","fromContract":false,"keyInclude":false,"mustInput":false,"paasDown":false,"sendSpace":"sqlParam","serviceParam":"QUAR","type":"variable"},{"dataType":1,"field":"C_S_AREADISTRICTCODE","fromContract":false,"keyInclude":true,"mustInput":false,"paasDown":false,"sendSpace":"sqlParam","serviceParam":"REGIONCODE","type":"variable"}]

contents.creator: admin(administrator)
contents.name: yjtxwyq
contents.displayName: 预警通新闻舆情
contents.inputConfig: [{"fromContract":false,"keyInclude":false,"mustInput":false,"paasDown":false,"sendSpace":"sql","serviceParam":"sql","type":"constant","value":"SELECT a.NewsCode, a.NewsDate, a.CRNW0003_006 AS sentiment, a.CompanyCode, b.ITName AS companyName, c.CRNW0001_003 AS title, c.CRNW0001_007 AS source, c.CRNW0001_018 AS publishtime FROM X_NEWS_TCRNW0003_ALL_V2 a JOIN X_NEWS_TCRNWITCODE b ON a.ITCode2 = b.ITCode2 JOIN X_NEWS_TCRNW0001 c ON a.NewsCode = c.NewsCode WHERE b.CR0001_008 = #{CR0001_008} AND a.NewsDate >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)"},{"dataType":1,"field":"C_S_QYUNIFSOCLCRCOD","fromContract":false,"keyInclude":true,"mustInput":false,"paasDown":false,"sendSpace":"sqlParam","serviceParam":"CR0001_008","type":"variable"}]
